MODULE: cosmos.evolution.fitness_tracker
FILE: cosmos/evolution/fitness_tracker.py (357 lines)
CATEGORY: evolution

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Fitness Tracker - Performance Metrics Collection

Tracks and aggregates fitness metrics for evolution:
- Task success rate
- Response quality
- Efficiency (tokens, time)
- User satisfaction

AGI v1.8 Improvements:
- TTL-based caching for fitness calculations
- Deque-based bounded storage for 

CLASSES:
- TTLCache: Simple TTL-based cache for fitness calculations.

AGI v1.8: Minimizes redundant 
  Methods: def get(self, key: str) -> Optional[Any]
  Methods: def set(self, key: str, value: Any) -> None
  Methods: def invalidate(self, key: Optional[str]=None) -> None
- FitnessMetric: A single fitness measurement.
- FitnessSnapshot: Aggregated fitness at a point in time.
- FitnessTracker: Tracks and aggregates fitness metrics over time.

  Methods: def record_task_outcome(self, success: bool, tokens_used: int, time_seconds: float, user_feedback: O
  Methods: def get_current_fitness(self, genome_id: Optional[str]=None) -> Dict[str, float]
